headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall After Nasdaq Hits High; Tesla Stock Sinks On Elon Musk Comments
summary: The Nasdaq hit a new high as techs led Wednesday. Tesla fell late on Elon Musk comments. Lam Research, CSX, Texas Instruments and IBM were big earnings movers overnight.

headline: Meta Faces New ESG Pressures As Board Shifts And Shares Screen Undervalued
summary: Shareholder groups have filed new proposals urging Meta Platforms to publish reports on human rights due diligence, online hate, climate impacts of AI data centers, H-1B worker practices, and executive pay linked to child safety. One proposal singles out Meta's role in alleged human rights issues in Gaza, calling for deeper disclosure on how its platforms are managed in conflict zones. Meta has also announced that two board members will not stand for re election, including Broadcom CEO Hock...

content.summary: Shareholder groups have filed new proposals urging Meta Platforms to publish reports on human rights due diligence, online hate, climate impacts of AI data centers, H-1B worker practices, and executive pay linked to child safety. One proposal singles out Meta's role in alleged human rights issues in Gaza, calling for deeper disclosure on how its platforms are managed in conflict zones. Meta has also announced that two board members will not stand for re election, including Broadcom CEO Hock...

headline: Why Broadcom (AVGO) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of fabless chip and software maker Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) jumped 4.3% in the afternoon session after the company announced an expanded collaboration with Google Cloud amid a broad rally in semiconductor stocks.
